---
name: Add a paper
about: Import a paper into the library (bibliography entry + paper note)
title: "Add paper: "
labels: agent
---

@sepo-agent /implement

Add the paper below to the library. Definition of done: `bibliography.bib`
gains the entry, a citekey-matched note exists under `content/papers/`, the
note is listed in `content/papers/_meta.json`, and `npm run check:site`
passes.
